machinery.name: CNC Turning Centers
machinery.description: High-speed precision turning with live tooling and bar feeders for continuous production of brass components.

machinery.name: CNC Machining Centers
machinery.description: Multi-axis vertical and horizontal machining centres for complex milling, drilling, and tapping operations.

machinery.name: Forging Presses
machinery.description: Hot forging presses from 100 to 500 tonnes for producing high-strength brass shapes with superior grain structure.

machinery.name: Surface Treatment Lines
machinery.description: Automated plating lines for nickel, chrome, tin plating and passivation with effluent treatment plant.

machinery.name: CMM Machines
machinery.description: Coordinate Measuring Machines for high-precision 3D dimensional inspection and geometric tolerance verification.

qualityLab.name: Optical Emission Spectrometer
qualityLab.description: For rapid and accurate chemical composition analysis of incoming brass raw materials and finished components.

qualityLab.name: Rockwell Hardness Tester
qualityLab.description: Measures material hardness to verify heat treatment results and ensure mechanical property compliance.

qualityLab.name: Surface Roughness Tester
qualityLab.description: Portable profilometer for measuring surface finish quality on machined and plated brass components.

qualityLab.name: Hydrostatic Pressure Test Bench
qualityLab.description: Tests brass valves and fittings up to 50 bar to verify leak-proof performance and pressure ratings.

qualityLab.name: Universal Tensile Testing Machine
qualityLab.description: Determines tensile strength, yield strength, and elongation properties of brass alloy samples.
